title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
